From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Slovak ski mountaineer and fell runner

Jana Heczková-Madajová

| Personal information | |
| --- | --- |
| Born | (1967-05-04) May 4, 1967 (age 58) |
| Sport | |
| Sport | Skiing |
| Club | SK Žiarska dolina |
|  | |

**Jana Madajová (born Lazarová)**,[[1]](#cite_note-1) née *Lazarová* (born May 4, 1967), of the *SK Žiarska dolina*[[2]](#cite_note-2) is a [Slovak](/wiki/Slovakia "Slovakia") [ski mountaineer](/wiki/Ski_mountaineer "Ski mountaineer") and [fell runner](/wiki/Fell_runner "Fell runner").

## Selected results

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Jana_Heczkov%C3%A1-Madajov%C3%A1&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Selected results")]

### Ski mountaineering

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Jana_Heczkov%C3%A1-Madajov%C3%A1&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Ski mountaineering")]

* 1998:
  + 2nd, [Patrouille des Glaciers](/wiki/Patrouille_des_Glaciers "Patrouille des Glaciers") (together with [Claudine Trécourt](/wiki/Claudine_Tr%C3%A9court "Claudine Trécourt") and [Alexia Zuberer](/wiki/Alexia_Zuberer "Alexia Zuberer"))
* 2000:
  + 2nd, *Psotkov memoriál*[[3]](#cite_note-3)
  + 2nd, *Tatranská magistrála*[[4]](#cite_note-4)
* 2001:
  + 5th, [European Championship](/wiki/2001_European_Championship_of_Ski_Mountaineering "2001 European Championship of Ski Mountaineering") team race (together with Miroslava Paliderová)
* 2002:
  + 6th, [World Championship](/wiki/2002_World_Championship_of_Ski_Mountaineering "2002 World Championship of Ski Mountaineering") team race (together with Miroslava Paliderová)
  + 6th, European Championship single race
  + 9th, European Championship combination ranking

#### Pierra Menta

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Jana_Heczkov%C3%A1-Madajov%C3%A1&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Pierra Menta")]

Main article: [Pierra Menta](/wiki/Pierra_Menta "Pierra Menta")

* 1995: 1st, together with [Tatiana Moskova](/w/index.php?title=Tatiana_Moskova&action=edit&redlink=1 "Tatiana Moskova (page does not exist)")
* 1996: 1st, together with Tatiana Moskova
* 1997: 3rd, together with Isabel Rogé Tartarini
* 1998: 3rd, together with [Corinne Favre](/wiki/Corinne_Favre "Corinne Favre")

### Sky running

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Jana_Heczkov%C3%A1-Madajov%C3%A1&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Sky running")]

* 2000:
  + 1st [Sentiero 4 Luglio SkyMarathon](/wiki/Sentiero_4_Luglio_SkyMarathon "Sentiero 4 Luglio SkyMarathon") half marathon

## References

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Jana_Heczkov%C3%A1-Madajov%C3%A1&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: References")]

2. **[^](#cite_ref-2)** [*VVysokohorský beh cez Klin*](http://www.jameslh.sk/doc/Klin2008_vysledky.pdf) [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20091014132809/http://www.jameslh.sk/doc/Klin2008_vysledky.pdf) 2009-10-14 at the [Wayback Machine](/wiki/Wayback_Machine "Wayback Machine"), 2008.
